description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build MATLAB Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow should build MATLAB packages for both Linux and Windows environments. It should check out the repository, set up C++, MATLAB, and caching, then build and package MATLAB toolboxes for each OS. For Windows, it should also sign C++ binaries using an Azure trusted signing action and upload the MATLAB packages as artifacts. Optionally, it can publish the packages to a repository specified by a URL and credentials.
